metadata.seed: This is too much. No more ranting or tearing myself to bits, just need to will myself into doing it. I just hate taking up others' time with my petty problems. I've failed at everything in life, and i hope i manage to succeed in this. I can do it. No other goal remains. Goodbye all, and thanks for everything.

patient.query: This is too much. No more ranting or tearing myself to bits, just need to will myself into doing it. I just hate taking up others' time with my petty problems. I've failed at everything in life, and i hope i manage to succeed in this. I can do it. No other goal remains. Goodbye all, and thanks for everything.

automatic_thoughts: I hate taking up others' time with my petty problems
I've failed at everything in life
I hope I manage to succeed in this

llm_response.response: It sounds like you’re feeling overwhelmed and thinking about ending things. When you said that, were you having any thoughts of hurting yourself or not wanting to be here?

validate_and_reflect.response: I’m really sorry you’re feeling like this—can you tell me if you’ve had thoughts about harming yourself or ending your life?

socratic_questioning.response: It sounds like you’re feeling overwhelmed and hopeless, and you’ve mentioned saying goodbye. When you said that, were you having any thoughts of hurting yourself or not wanting to be here?

alternative_perspective.response: I’m really concerned about what you’re feeling right now. When you said “Goodbye all,” were you having thoughts of hurting yourself or not wanting to be here?

safety_check.response: It sounds like you’re feeling overwhelmed and thinking about ending things. When you said that, were you having any thoughts of hurting yourself or not wanting to be here?
